subject: WM-0088 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified OPFS A/B slot + manifest save path, SHA-256/size integrity checks, export/import/load/delete and quota failure recovery with old slot preserved; user-facing and structured diagnostics are present and limited to safe ids/sizes/checksums/reason codes. Windows/Web container interoperability is correctly recorded as blocked because Electron preload still exposes placeholder unavailable save ports. No sim-core/Worker authority, public save compatibility, schema/codec migration, dependency, baseline, or M5 artifact changes found. tools/test-runner.mjs only adds the approved persistence filter route. Required checks passed: typecheck, test --filter persistence, test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, and pnpm quality.
